CronSchedule.description: A cron expression in standard 5-field format (e.g. "0 3 * * *").

DesiredCondition.description: A single desired state condition. The Asset is Ready only when all conditions are satisfied. Each condition carries a `name` that is unique within the Asset (after DesiredGroup expansion) and used as a key in execution logs.

oneOf.description: Can transition to Not Ready as time passes beyond `maxAge`.

checkAt.description: Optional cron expression for additional evaluation at a specific time.

column.description: If omitted, freshness is determined from table metadata instead of a column value.

interval.description: Polling interval for re-evaluating this condition.

maxAge.description: Maximum acceptable age of the data before the condition becomes Not Ready.

name.description: Unique identifier for this condition within the Asset.

oneOf.description: Query must return a scalar boolean. Ready when the result is true.

interval.description: Optional polling interval. If omitted, only evaluated on upstream state change or after sync.

name.description: Unique identifier for this condition within the Asset.

query.description: SQL query that must return a scalar boolean.

oneOf.description: Runs an external command. Ready when the process exits with code 0. `run` is argv: the first element is the program, the rest are arguments.

interval.description: Optional polling interval. If omitted, only evaluated on upstream state change or after sync.

name.description: Unique identifier for this condition within the Asset.

run.description: Command and arguments in argv format.

DesiredGroupRef.description: A reference to a `kind: DesiredGroup` resource.

ref.description: Name of the DesiredGroup resource to reference.

DesiredSetEntry.description: An entry in `desiredSets`. Either a reference to a `kind: DesiredGroup` or an inline condition.

ref.description: Name of the Source resource to reference.
Name of the Sync resource to reference.

with.description: Template variables passed to the Sync resource for argument interpolation.

description: Spec for `kind: Asset`. The core resource: declares desired state and convergence operations. The reconciliation loop continuously evaluates `desiredSets` and runs `sync` until all conditions are met.

autoSync.description: Controls automatic sync execution in `nagi serve`. Defaults to `true`.

desiredSets.description: All entries are AND-evaluated. All true → Ready. When omitted, the Asset is always Ready.

resync.description: Reference to the Sync resource for recovery operations. Falls back to `sync` when omitted.

sync.description: Reference to the Sync resource for convergence operations.

title: AssetSpec
